zh.London, Middlesex, England: 英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦
zh.London, London, England: 美國堪薩斯州薩姆納倫敦
zh.St. Leonard, Shaldeford, England: 英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特艾可謝特 聖 倫納德
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Nanseglos於大約1443年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親William Nansicles25歲，母親Mary Nansiglos22歲。他於1465年與Elizabeth de Lucy在美國堪薩斯州薩姆納倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1457年在英國倫敦被列為comptroller of the great custom。他去世於1477年7月10日之前在英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特艾可謝特 聖 倫納德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Nanseglos于大约1443年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，他的父亲William Nansicles25岁，母亲Mary Nansiglos22岁。他于1465年与Elizabeth de Lucy在美国堪萨斯州薩姆納倫敦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1457年在英国倫敦被列为comptroller of the great custom。他去世于1477年7月10日之前在英国英格兰希迪 本 倫敦，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特艾可謝特 聖 倫納德。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Nanseglos was born about 1443, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, William Nansicles, was 25 and his mother, Mary Nansiglos, was 22. He married Elizabeth de Lucy in 1465, in London, Sumner, Kansas, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. In 1457, at the age of 15, his occupation is listed as comptroller of the great custom in London, England. He died before 10 July 1477, in City of London, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Exeter St Leonard, Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St. Leonard, Shaldeford, England: Exeter St Leonard, Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Nanseglos est né environ 1443, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, William Nansicles, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Nansiglos, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Lucy en 1465, à London, Sumner, Kansas, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. En 1457, à l’âge de 15 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est comptroller of the great custom à Londres, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 10 juillet 1477, à City of London, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Exeter St Leonard, Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Nanseglos um 1443 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Nansicles 25 und seine Mutter Mary Nansiglos 22. Er hat 1465 in London, Sumner, Kansas, Vereinigte Staaten Elizabeth de Lucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1457, als er 15 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als comptroller of the great custom in London, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 10. Juli 1477 in City of London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Exeter St Leonard, Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Nanseglos è nato il circa 1443 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, William Nansicles, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mary Nansiglos, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Lucy nel 1465, nel London, Sumner, Kansas, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1457, all'età di 15 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come comptroller of the great custom nel London, England. Morì prima del 10 luglio 1477, nel City of London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Exeter St Leonard, Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Nanseglosが約1443年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父William Nansiclesは25歳，母Mary Nansiglosは22歳であった。1465年にアメリカ合衆国カンザス州スムナーロンドンでElizabeth de Lucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1457年，15歳の時，イギリスロンドンでの職業はcomptroller of the great customと記録されている。彼は1477年7月10日以前にイギリスイギリスシトイ オフ ロンドンで死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンエクセターエクセター スト レオナルドにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Leonard, Shaldeford, England: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터 세터 스트 리나르드
ko.lifeSummary: William Nanseglos(이)가 대략 1443년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Nansicles(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Nansiglos(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1465년 미국 캔자스 주 섬너 런던에서 Elizabeth de Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1457년, 15세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 런던에서 comptroller of the great custom이었다. 그는 1477년 7월 10일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 시티 프 런던에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터 세터 스트 리나르드에 묻혔다.

pt.St. Leonard, Shaldeford, England: Exeter St Leonard, Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Nanseglos nasceu aproximadamente 1443, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Nansicles, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary Nansiglos, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Lucy em 1465, em London, Sumner, Cansas, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1457, com 15 anos, sua profissão aparece como comptroller of the great custom em London, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 10 de julho de 1477, em City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Exeter St Leonard, Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Leonard, Shaldeford, England: эксетир ст леонард, эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Nanseglos родился около 1443 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Nansicles было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Nansiglos, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Lucy в 1465 г. в местности лондон, сумнир, Канзас, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. В 1457 году, в возрасте 15 лет,  он работал по профессии comptroller of the great custom в местности Лондон, Англия. Он умер перед 10 июля 1477 г. в местности сити оф лондон, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности эксетир ст леонард, эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Nanseglos nació aproximadamente 1443, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, William Nansicles, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mary Nansiglos, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Lucy en 1465, en London, Sumner, Kansas, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1457, a la edad de 15 años, su ocupación registrada era comptroller of the great custom en London, Inglaterra. Murió antes de 10 de julio de 1477, en City of London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Exeter St Leonard, Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
